[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Barse Neomen''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. A competent officer who graduated from the [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]] [[Corulag Academy|Imperial Academy]], he was stationed at the [[Sisar Run/Legends|Sisar Run]], placed under the command of [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Newen Streeg]]'s forces. He quietly despised Governor Streeg and would slip in subtle insults whenever possible; however, he was smart enough not to press his luck too much. He viewed his assignment to the Sisar Run as "just bad luck."

Neomen's ambition outshone his ability. He grew bored and that was when he became corrupted by [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] agents. He collected [[Expansionist Period/Legends|Expansionist Era]] art, specifically from the pre-[[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Klatooinian/Legends|Klatooinians]] and [[Nikto/Legends|Niktos]] periods. His corruption helped his collection to grow without raising too many eyebrows. He commanded a [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]], the ''[[Ion Storm]]'', where he kept his second-in-command [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Surlev]] on a short leash because the other man was extremely loyal to Governor Streeg.
